nodes.name: Nicator
nodes.summary: Nicator（Nicator）是图谱中的分类级分类节点，当前关联3种鸟类，如Western nicator、Eastern nicator、Yellow-throated nicator。

nodes.name: Eastern nicator
nodes.summary: The eastern nicator (Nicator gularis) is a species of songbird in the family Nicatoridae. It is found in Eswatini, Kenya, Malawi, Mozambique, Somalia, South Africa, Tanzania, Zambia, and Zimbabwe. Its natural habitats are subtropical or tropical dry forests, dry savanna, and subtropical or tropical moist shrubland. It occurs south to around Mtunzini in northern KwaZulu-Natal, South Africa, and is regularly reported from lowland areas north through to east Africa, including inland areas along the Zambezi River. This species was formerly called the "yellow-spotted nicator" although this is no longer the case, with that name now belonging solely to the central African western nicator. Diet It is an insectivore. References External links Eastern Nicator (= Yellow-spotted Nicator) - Species text in The Atlas of Southern African Birds.
